name: Transit
content: Most errands can be run by bus in Limerick, though more frequent service (especially during peak hours) would be nice. The entire bus system is battery electric, which is especially impressive. The river walk connects downtown Limerick, the university, and several other towns. Ireland in general is very walkable, and I would warn the easily distracted against taking a short stroll lest they find themselves on an eight hour excursion to Ardnacrusha.
